channel.title: 术语表 | FORRT - Framework for Open and Reproducible Research Training
channel.copyright: © 2026 - FORRT > Framework for Open and Reproducible Research Training

item.title: COAR存储库良好实践社区框架 [COAR Community Framework for Good Practices in Repositories]
PCI 注册报告 [PCI Registered Reports]
三盲同行评审 [Triple-blind peer review]
不当测量行为 [Questionable Measurement Practices (QMP)]
不当研究行为或不当报告行为 [Questionable Research Practices or Questionable Reporting Practices (QRPs)]
元科学或元研究 [Meta-science or Meta-research]
公众对科学的信任 [Public Trust in Science]
创造性破坏式的复现方法 [Creative destruction approach to replication]
协作式复现与教育项目 [Collaborative Replication and Education Project (CREP)]
单盲同行评审 [Single-blind peer review]
参与者和公众参与 [Patient and Public Involvement (PPI)]
双盲同行评审 [Double-blind peer review]
发表偏倚（文件抽屉问题 [Publication bias (File Drawer Problem)]
发表后同行评审 [Post Publication Peer Review]
可重复性危机（又称可复现性或复现危机） [Reproducibility crisis (aka Replicability or replication crisis)]
同行评审开放性倡议 [PRO (peer review openness) initiative]
大型开放式在线论文 [Massively Open Online Papers (MOOPs)]
大型开放式在线课程 [Massive Open Online Courses (MOOCs)]
姓名歧义问题 [Name Ambiguity Problem]
对抗性（合作性）评论 [Adversarial (collaborative) commentary]
尽责的研究与创新 [Responsible Research and Innovation]
开放、可靠、透明的生态与进化生物学学会 [Society for Open, Reliable, and Transparent Ecology and Evolutionary biology (SORTEE)]
开放可重复研究与教学框架 [FORRT]
开放同行评审 [Open Peer Review]
开放学术知识库 [Open Scholarship Knowledge Base]
开放教育资源 [Open Educational Resources (OERs)]
开放教育资源在线库 [Open Educational Resources (OER) Commons]
开放研究者和贡献者ID [ORCID (Open Researcher and Contributor ID)]
开放科学中心 [Center for Open Science (COS)]
开放科学框架 [Open Science Framework]
开放科学的命名实体文本匿名化工具 [Named entity-based Text Anonymization for Open Science (NETANOS)]
引用多样性声明 [Citation Diversity Statement]
心理科学改进学会 [Society for the Improvement of Psychological Science (SIPS)]
探索性数据分析 [Exploratory data analysis]
数字对象唯一标识符 [DOI (digital object identifier)]
数据分析与共享最佳实践委员会 [Committee on Best Practices in Data Analysis and Sharing (COBIDAS)]
数据管理计划 [Data management plan (DMP)]
数据获取与研究透明度 [Data Access and Research Transparency (DA-RT)]
早期职业研究人员 [Early career researchers (ECRs)]
期刊影响因子 [Journal Impact Factor™]
歧路花园 [Garden of forking paths]
知识共享许可协议 [Creative Commons (CC) license]
研究人员自由度 [Researcher degrees of freedom]
研究数据存储库注册系统 [Registry of Research Data Repositories]
研究数据管理 [Research Data Management]
研究贡献指标（p） [Research Contribution Metric (*p*)]
经济和社会影响 [Economic and societal impact]
署名顺序决定贡献法 [Sequence-determines-credit approach (SDC)]
脑成像数据结构 [BIDS data structure]
自下而上的方法（用于开放学术） [Bottom-up approach (to Open Scholarship)]
西方的、受过教育的、工业化的、富裕的、民主的社会 [WEIRD]
规范曲线分析 [Specification Curve Analysis]
解放我们的知识平台 [Free Our Knowledge Platform]
贝叶斯参数估计 [Bayesian Parameter Estimation]
赠予（或客座）署名权 [Gift (or Guest) Authorship]
通用学习设计 [Universal design for learning (UDL)]
通用数据保护条例 [General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)]
零假设显著性检验方法 [Null Hypothesis Significance Testing (NHST)]
非干预、可重复、开放的系统综述 [Non-Intervention, Reproducible, and Open Systematic Reviews (NIRO-SR)]
首末作者强调规范 [First-last-author-emphasis norm (FLAE)]
马太效应（科学领域） [Matthew effect (in science)]
